title: baccaurea nesophila
intro: Baccaurea nesophila is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to Southeast Asia, and is also known as the Asian boxleaf or Asian box hawthorn. The medicinal properties of Baccaurea nesophila include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections due to its antiviral and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Baccaurea nesophila include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Baccaurea nesophila is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and fruits can also be used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
